description: Single trackSchemaFromEvent call — baseline: one HTTP call is made (no dedup suppression in a single invocation)
notes: Baseline single-invocation dedup fixture. A single call always sends one HTTP request — deduplication only fires when two calls with the same key+properties occur within 500 ms in the same process. The single-invocation harness cannot model the suppression case; this fixture verifies the non-suppressed path only.

description: Single _avoFunctionTrackSchemaFromEvent call — avoFunction=true path sends one HTTP call (no cross-bucket suppression in a single invocation)
notes: Verifies the avoFunctions bucket path: avoFunction=true, eventId and eventHash are set in the wire body. Cross-bucket suppression (avoFunctions → manual) cannot be tested in a single invocation — see README for manual testing guidance.
